zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes於1195年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南時，他的父親Hugues X de LUSIGNAN13歲，母親Delcia Hastings31歲。他於1222年與Jeanne de Bourgogne在法國結婚。他去世於1252年9月2日在法國享年57歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes was born in 1195, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Hugues X de LUSIGNAN, was 13 and his mother, Delcia Hastings, was 31. He married Jeanne de Bourgogne in 1222, in France. He died on 2 September 1252, in France, at the age of 57, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes est né en 1195, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugues X de LUSIGNAN, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Delcia Hastings, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Bourgogne en 1222, à France. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1252, à France, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes 1195 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues X de LUSIGNAN 13 und seine Mutter Delcia Hastings 31. Er hat 1222 in Frankreich Jeanne de Bourgogne geheiratet. Er starb am 2. September 1252 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Jeanne de Bourgogne nel 1222, nel Francia. Morì il 2 settembre 1252, nel Francia, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînesが1195年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで生まれた時，父Hugues X de LUSIGNANは13歳，母Delcia Hastingsは31歳であった。1222年にフランスでJeanne de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼は1252年9月2日にフランスで57歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 인드르 이소우던
ko.lifeSummary: Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes(이)가 1195년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues X de LUSIGNAN(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Delcia Hastings(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1222년 프랑스에서 Jeanne de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1252년 9월 2일 프랑스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes nasceu em 1195, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugues X de LUSIGNAN, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Delcia Hastings, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Bourgogne em 1222, em França. Ele faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1252, em França, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.Issoudun, Indre, Centre-Val de Loire, Fr: иссоудун, индр, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes родился в 1195 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues X de LUSIGNAN было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Delcia Hastings, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Bourgogne в 1222 г. в местности Франция. Он умер 2 сентября 1252 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

Se casó con Jeanne de Bourgogne en 1222, en Francia. Murió el 2 de septiembre de 1252, en Francia, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
